ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the station is located */,
  "opened_date" TEXT /* Date the station was opened */,
  "total_turnstiles" INTEGER /* Total number of turnstiles at the station */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station (e.g., active, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the line (e.g., NR, Q, R) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the line */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code of the line */,
  "length_km" REAL /* Length of the line in kilometers */,
  "number_of_stations" INTEGER /* Number of stations on the line */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the line (e.g., active, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnstiles" (
  "turnstile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnstile */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the turnstile is located */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the line that the turnstile serves */,
  "turnstile_name" TEXT /* Name of the turnstile */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of turnstile (e.g., standard, high-capacity) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the turnstile was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the turnstile (e.g., active, out of service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnstile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnstiles_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turnstiles_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry event */,
  "turnstile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turnstile where the entry occurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the entry event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the entry event */,
  "entries" INTEGER /* Number of entries recorded */,
  "entry_type" TEXT /* Type of entry (e.g., paid, free, staff) */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of card used (e.g., contactless, magnetic strip) */,
  "card_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier of the card used */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of entry */,
  "day_type" TEXT /* Type of day (e.g., weekday, weekend, holiday) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entries_turnstile_id FOREIGN KEY ("turnstile_id") REFERENCES turnstiles ("turnstile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_turnstiles" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "turnstile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turnstile */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the turnstile was installed at the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the turnstile at the station (e.g., active, out of service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "turnstile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turnstile_lines" (
  "turnstile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turnstile */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the line */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the turnstile was assigned to the line */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the turnstile on the line (e.g., active, out of service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnstile_id", "line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "turnstile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turnstile */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "access_granted_date" TEXT /* Date when access was granted */,
  "access_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when access will expire */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's access (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "turnstile_id")
)
column_names: City where the station is located
